title: Galloping Fury
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Arthur F. Statter, Tom Reed
actors: Hoot Gibson, Otis Harlan, Sally Rand
plot: Billy Haven, a young rancher, accidentally discovers that clay found on his ranch will, when mixed with water, become the most beautifying mud-pack cosmetic that any young girl, or old woman, could desire. Then the land-grabbers, ...
